ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot wielding a dagger, emphasizing both caution and precision.  The movement will be deliberate and controlled, reflecting the dangerous nature of the weapon. The left arm will primarily act as a support or brace, while the right arm will hold and subtly manipulate the dagger. Each frame represents a distinct shift in the robot's posture and the dagger's position. Frame 1 shows the robot in a neutral stance, with the left arm slightly raised and the right arm extended, preparing to hold the dagger. Frame 2 shows the robot gripping the dagger, with the right arm slightly bent to ensure a firm hold. The left arm provides additional stability. Frame 3 shows the robot bringing the dagger up in a defensive posture, emphasizing the weapon's potential danger. Frame 4 shows the robot lowering the dagger, returning to a more neutral but still cautious stance.

frames.beat: the right arm extends to grasp the dagger
dagger rises defensively, a sharp threat
the weapon is lowered, still held with care
